definitions.text: prefiks som uttrykker at noe virker mot eller er imot etterleddet
definitions.translation: prefix expressing that something acts against or is against the suffix

definitions.text: i ord som antibiotikum, antidoping, antihistamin, antiamerikansk, antirasisme, antivirus og antirefleksbehandle
definitions.translation: in words like antibiotic, antidoping, antihistamine, anti-American, anti-racism, antivirus, and anti-reflection treatment
